name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: And from Mitch McConnell and Paul Ryan... *cricket noises*
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6728/24c69fd9/a783b53d/189b79a0/2143749967/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE859N_digital_email_20170830_WeakGOP_inact&source=WQEFE859N_digital_email_20170830_WeakGOP_inact")
---

Peter,

Spineless.

That's pretty much the only way to describe Republican leadership's reactions to Trump's latest offenses.

When Trump equated white supremacists in Charlottesville to the counterprotestors, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell was silent, and Speaker Paul Ryan said a censure of Trump was too far.

On Friday, when Trump moved forward with his discriminatory ban on transgender military recruits, McConnell and Ryan said NOTHING.

**Every day, Mitch McConnell and Paul Ryan prove that we can't count on them to check Trump's worst impulses.**

**[Donate $3 to help reach our End-of-Month goal so that we can elect leaders who WILL stand up to Trump.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6728/24c69fd9/a783b53d/189b79a1/2143749967/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170828_email_August-EOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+reach+our+EndofMonth+go&utm_campaign=WQEFE859N_digital_email_20170830_WeakGOP_inact&source=WQEFE859N_digital_email_20170830_WeakGOP_inact")**

Pro-choice Democratic women are already stepping up to hold Trump accountable.

House Democratic Leader Nancy Pelosi has said she supports censuring Trump for his repulsive defense of white supremacists.

And ever since Trump announced he would ban transgender people from serving openly in our military, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand has been fighting back. She's recruited 44 other senators -- including every EMILY's List senator -- to sign a letter opposing the ban. And she's working on legislation to fight it.
We need more elected leaders like them who will resist Trump instead of giving him an opening to spread discrimination and hate.

**Donate $3 before midnight tomorrow so we can grow the ranks of our women in Congress:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-August-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6728/24c69fd9/a783b53d/189b79a2/2143749967/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170828_email_August-EOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachAugustGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE859N_digital_email_20170830_WeakGOP_inact&source=WQEFE859N_digital_email_20170830_WeakGOP_inact")**

Thank you,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6728/24c69fd9/a783b53d/189b79a3/2143749967/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170828_email_August-EOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE859N_digital_email_20170830_WeakGOP_inact&source=WQEFE859N_digital_email_20170830_WeakGOP_inact")

subject: Mark your calendar, Derek:
body:
Step up before tonight's deadline.

**We need 32 Democrats from your community to step up before midnight to hit our August fundraising goal. Can you chip in $3 or more today?

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523640/4067b0a/3ee022656/7e6ec714/4174014880/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170831_joc_nd&source=em_20170831_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170831_joc_nd")**

Derek, I need you to remember this date. Set a reminder on your phone. Grab a calendar and circle it with a Sharpie.

November 7th, 2017.

It's Election Day, and it's not that far away -- only 68 days from now. We're doing everything we can to support the Democrats running this year and next, and we need your help today. Can you pitch in $3 or more?

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

name: The White House
subject: Hurricane Harvey Relief Efforts Continue
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ad06379931c9ac11fb7cd268c5c31c855163589b169c835f2d8c8559a4195f8a6fb2314450e683b83f5e1aa8bd4b1b7cec5a398e72a92f7e

-------------

Hurricane Harvey Rumor Control

There is a lot of misinformation circulating online about Hurricane Harvey. Last night, FEMA’s Director of the National Flood Insurance Program, Roy Wright, went live on Facebook to debunk some of these rumors. FEMA has also put together an on-going list of rumors and their true or false status. Please tell a friend,

name: Tom Perez
subject: Derek, I want to win
body:
Step up before tonight's deadline.
---
**We need 24 Democrats from your community to step up by midnight tonight if we're going to hit our August fundraising goal. Can you chip in $10 or more today?

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=24&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170831_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170831_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170831_tp_v2s2")**

Derek --

I come in to work every day at the DNC with a simple, clear vision: to win elections up and down the ballot, from school boards to the Senate, all over the country. I don't intend to pass up any opportunity to elect Democrats.

That's especially true this year -- a year when some folks might be inclined to tune out from politics.

But this year's races couldn't be more important, and winning in November will give us the momentum we need to go into 2018 at our best.

That's why we're making big investments this year, like we did earlier this summer in Virginia. But there's still a lot more work to do.

Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is tonight, and what we have in the bank at midnight will determine how much more we can do to get out the vote this year and prepare for some big races that are coming.

Will you pitch in $10 or whatever you can right now to help make sure we can do whatever it takes to win? We only need 24 more folks like you in your community to step up in order to hit our goal.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=24&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170831_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170831_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170831_tp_v2s2")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=24&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170831_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170831_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170831_tp_v2s2")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=24&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170831_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170831_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170831_tp_v2s2")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=24&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170831_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170831_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170831_tp_v2s2")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=24&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170831_tp_v2s2&source=em_20170831_tp_v2s2&refcode=em_20170831_tp_v2s2")
** Thanks,

Tom

Friend,

Just weeks after our historic victory in the Montana Congressional Special Election race to succeed now Secretary of the Interior Ryan Zinke, we already have Democrats leveling their 2018 challenges against me.

_That's right, Friend_. A Billings attorney is the first Democrat to declare, but certainly will not be the last leftist Democrat lining up to take me on next year. And unlike every other member of Congress running for reelection, we are just coming off a bruising campaign and we must immediately face another race.

I am counting on my strongest supporters to help me - once again before the end of August.

**[Will you take action now to ensure we can face the growing challenge and prepare for an intense year of defending our principles and spreading our message to the voters of Montana with your generous End of Month Contribution to Gianforte for Congress now?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43986771:sKr9qcENn:m:1:1494336505:60259C7451C1A64529C73DF01B98F7F4:r)**

| [** Friend's August-End
Contribution **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43986771:sKr9qcENn:m:1:1494336505:60259C7451C1A64529C73DF01B98F7F4:r)
---

Friend, millions were spent in the first half of 2017 to defeat me, but Nancy Pelosi and liberals from D.C. failed. They are going to do whatever they can this year and next to make sure they don't fail again.

But with one of the most targeted races in the nation last year, we had to spend our campaign war chest to fight back against the left's attacks. Especially NOW, with less than 48 hours to go this month, **[we need an additional $5,325 to make up the difference before time runs out at midnight Thursday night.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43986771:sKr9qcENn:m:1:1494336505:60259C7451C1A64529C73DF01B98F7F4:r)**

**[Friend, can I count on you to help us chip away at our goal? $10, $25, $50, $100 or more- _whatever you can swing_ - will help!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43986771:sKr9qcENn:m:1:1494336505:60259C7451C1A64529C73DF01B98F7F4:r)**

Sincerely,

Greg Gianforte

P.S. To lay the groundwork for a successful defense, we need a big push during these last hours of August to get back in the game! **[Please make your strong August gift now.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43986771:sKr9qcENn:m:1:1494336505:60259C7451C1A64529C73DF01B98F7F4:r)**

[** Friend's August-End

body:
**NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on Republican plans to unrig the economy**
**For Immediate Release: **August 31, 2017
**Contact: **Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310
**Concord **– Statement from NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on President Donald Trump’s plan for tax reform:

“President Trump’s vision for tax reform will help working families keep more of their paychecks and put an end to the rigged economy that only benefits powerful special interests. By updating and simplifying the tax code, Republicans are putting middle-class families first, increasing wages, and lowering taxes. We need a fair tax code for working families. Annie Kuster and Carol Shea-Porter should stop playing politics with our paychecks.”

name: Donna Brazile
subject: Everything I needed to know about the GOP...
body:
Step up before tonight's deadline.
---
**We need 17 Democrats from your community to step up before midnight to hit our August fundraising goal. Can you chip in $3 or more right now?

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523664/4067b0a/3ebe76aca/7e6eb4cc/1404952579/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170831_db_nd&source=em_20170831_db_nd&refcode=em_20170831_db_nd")**

Derek, I learned everything I needed to know about Donald Trump on Friday night.

At the end of the day, as millions of Americans braced for a historic storm, he issued a ban on transgender service members in the military and a pardon for his friend, former sheriff Joe Arpaio, one of our nation's most notorious agents of racism.

He showed us exactly who he is -- not just as a president, but as a person.

But as bad as Donald Trump is, I happen to think the Republicans who've sat idly by as this morally bankrupt president wreaks havoc on anything in his path are even worse. [**If they refuse to put the people they represent ahead of blind obedience to their president, then we must vote them out of office.**](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523664/4067b0a/3ebe76aca/7e6eb4cd/1404952579/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+If+they+refuse+to+put+the+people+they+re&utm_campaign=em_20170831_db_nd&source=em_20170831_db_nd&refcode=em_20170831_db_nd")

Our end-of-month deadline is tonight, and we have some catching up to do. Make sure we have enough in the bank to take on every Republican. Be one of the 17 people we still need from your community to pitch in before the deadline.

name: Tom Perez
subject: Derek, will you make one of the 13 donations we need from your community before midnight?
body:
Step up before tonight's deadline.
---
**We need 13 Democrats from your community to step up by midnight tonight if we're going to hit our August fundraising goal. Can you chip in $10 or more today?

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline1?keycode=&mg_city=&mg_state=&mg_number=13&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170831_tp2_rem&source=em_20170831_tp2_rem&refcode=em_20170831_tp2_rem")**

Derek --

The 14 months between now and Election Day 2018 may seem like a long time, but they'll go by faster than you think.

So we're not waiting around to lay the groundwork to take back our majorities in the House and Senate. That's what tonight's deadline is all about.

As bad as Donald Trump is, the Republicans in Congress who have sat on their hands -- or, at worst, enabled him -- as he's attacked our country's most fundamental values are an even bigger disgrace. They need to go, and we're already hard at work to throw them out of office next year.

We're so close to hitting our goal tonight. We just need 13 more donations from your community before midnight to get over the finish line.

Derek, will you make one right now?

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: These are the stakes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---

| | Peter,

I spent six days last week in an Indiana-made RV on my Hoosier Highways tour, listening to Hoosiers about how I can fight for them in the Senate. At every single stop, I talked to someone else whose story stood out, who was tired of the gridlock and petty infighting in Washington, and who simply wanted someone in the Senate who had their back.
* A homeless veteran in Winchester who called on me to fight for better paths to recovery for those affected by the opioid crisis.
* A retired coal miner in Boonville who thanked me for saving his health care benefits -- and asked me to keep working to protect his pension.
* A mother in Jeffersonville who wanted me to keep standing up for access to quality, affordable health care, and against insurers who want to discriminate against Hoosiers like her daughter who have a pre-existing condition.

**Here 's what's at stake in next year's election:** whether these folks will have someone like me working for them every single day in the Senate, or if Republicans can fill our seat with another rubber stamp for their out-of-touch policies. I'm running for re-election because the people I spoke to last week all across Indiana need someone to be their champion.

**But I can 't do it alone.**

Peter, out-of-state special interests badly want our seat. They've already spent millions of dollars to distort my record, and tens of millions more in misleading ads are on the way. **I need your help to chip in a few dollars today and demonstrate that our grassroots campaign won 't be overwhelmed. Step up and donate before the deadline.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27b6/7377f838/37c1085e/51fbc137/2437659832/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?express_lane=true&refcode=20170831nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27b6/7377f838/37c1085e/51fbc136/2437659832/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?express_lane=true&refcode=20170831nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27b6/7377f838/37c1085e/51fbc131/2437659832/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?express_lane=true&refcode=20170831nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27b6/7377f838/37c1085e/51fbc130/2437659832/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?express_lane=true&refcode=20170831nd&amount=100")**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27b6/7377f838/37c1085e/51fbc133/2437659832/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?refcode=20170831nd")****
Tonight is another crucial test for our campaign. Hard-line extremists and dark money groups are looking for any sign of weakness that puts a bigger target on our back -- and with only a few hours to go before tonight's big deadline, we're still short of our target.

**The folks I met on my tour are counting on me. I 'm counting on you. [Can you donate $5 before midnight and help us meet our goal?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27b6/7377f838/37c1085e/51fbc132/2437659832/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?refcode=20170831nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,
Joe

P.S. Indiana's stakes in this election are too high for us to fail tonight. Hoosiers are depending on us to reach our goal before the deadline. **[Please help out and donate $5 now>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27b6/7377f838/37c1085e/51fbc132/2437659832/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?refcode=20170831nd&amount=10")**

****[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27b6/7377f838/37c1085e/51fbc12d/2437659832/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-augeom17?refcode=20170831nd&amount=25")****

name: Jim Hightower
subject: This is climate change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
In times of global crisis, the United States has always striven to be a leader
#
Friends,
The tragedy of the devastating flooding from Hurricane Harvey has already cost dozens of lives, with tens of thousands of families flooded out of their homes, and hundreds of billions of dollars needed to help Houston and surrounding communities along the Texas-Louisiana Gulf Coast recover.
In addition, we have to think more broadly about the ravages of climate change. In the same week as Harvey, torrential rains have caused mudslides in Sierra Leone that have claimed more than 1,000 lives, and the worst monsoon storms in South Asia have resulted in flooding that has killed more than 1,200 people across India, Nepal, and Bangladesh. Twentieth century infrastructure is not equipped to handle this new climate reality, and our over-reliance on fossil fuels has only exacerbated the effects of a warming climate.
In times of global crisis, the United States has always striven to be a leader. The future of our planet is in peril, but we have the capacity to expand newly innovated technologies on a massive scale. Like Franklin Delano Roosevelt established the Tennessee Valley Authority at the height of the Great Depression to bring new technology to vast swathes of our country, creating millions of new jobs in the process, we need a modern day initiative to transition away from fossil fuels and embrace renewable energy.
Members of Congress like Senators Bernie Sanders and Jeff Merkley, Representatives Raul Grijalva, Tulsi Gabbard, Pramila Jayapal, and many others have introduced strong pieces of legislation to rapidly transition our economy off of fossil fuels to renewable energy. [**We must come together as one nation and one people by supporting these efforts and more --sign our petition demanding Congress act on climate now.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afbe/bed43eb/8059dee/75ffaf12/2818929150/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/act-on-climate-now?source=em170831-send")
No matter an individual's party affiliation, global climate change is a crisis that demands cooperation and coordination amongst our political parties and the countries of the world.
We cannot predict natural disasters, but we can work to mitigate the worst effects of human-caused climate change. There is still time to act to ensure tragedies like we have seen in the Gulf Coast, Sierra Leone, South Asia, and regions around the world do not get worse.
[**Sign our petition calling on Congress to pass legislation to end our reliance on fossil fuels and move to sustainable energy. Help us save the world for ourselves and future generations.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afbe/bed43eb/8059dee/75ffaf12/2818929150/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/act-on-climate-now?source=em170831-send")
Now is the time for change. Incrementalism is no longer a viable option. Your leadership in the global climate movement can help to ensure a better future.
In solidarity,
Jim Hightower
Board Member
Our Revolution
**[SIGN THE PETITION»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afbe/bed43eb/8059dee/75ffaf12/2818929150/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/act-on-climate-now?source=em170831-send")**

name: Donna Brazile
subject: Republicans don't know what it means to be equal
body:
Step up before tonight's deadline.
---
**We need eight Democrats from your community to step up before midnight to hit our August fundraising goal. Can you chip in $3 or more right now?

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523678/4067b0a/3e9ec4739/7e6eaf18/1045167393/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/August-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170831_db2_nd&source=em_20170831_db2_nd&refcode=em_20170831_db2_nd")**

Derek, we marked an important anniversary on Saturday: 97 years since the 19th Amendment went into effect, guaranteeing women the right to vote.

Nearly a century later, the fight for our rights is more important than ever before.

We are facing a Republican Party that is relentless in its attacks on women's health care, using any opportunity it can find to try and defund Planned Parenthood. Republicans oppose solutions to achieve equal pay and other policies that help women gain equal footing in the workplace.

And even though our right to vote is enshrined in the Constitution, Republicans have been working tirelessly to undermine it. Many of the restrictions they've put into place -- from burdensome voter ID laws to limitations on early voting -- disproportionately impact women.

In observance of this anniversary, Donald Trump proclaimed Saturday to be Women's Equality Day. But he and his fellow Republicans fundamentally do not understand what it means to be equal.

For me, this anniversary is a reminder of why the work we do is so important -- and a call to action. I need you to say you're with us to elect more Democrats who will fight for equality. If you are, chip in $3 or more before tonight's deadline.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Texas needs our help
body:
#
Team --
First and foremost, if you are in Texas, or have friends and family there, we hope you're all safe. If you are in Texas and need help, you can call 211 or 311 for non life-threatening emergencies, and 911 for life-threatening emergencies. We're praying for your safety and for the speedy recovery of your community.
Here in Florida, we are no stranger to natural disasters -- and when we have endured storms, we have always been able to count on our friends, family, and neighbors from across the country to pitch in and help in our recovery. Today, I'm asking you to extend that same help to those in Texas who have endured Hurricane Harvey.
The Coalition for the Homeless of Houston is working to help those displaced by Hurricane Harvey. [**You can contribute to them here.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b2/9e00690/4f38106c/24036a16/4144839742/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017-ch?refcode=em170831")
The Houston Food Bank is providing food, water, and supplies to those who have been forced from their homes. [**You can contribute to them here.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b2/9e00690/4f38106c/24036a29/4144839742/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017-hfb?refcode=em170831")
The Texas Diaper Bank is helping families with young children and infants who are in need after the storm. [**You can contribute to them here.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b2/9e00690/4f38106c/24036a28/4144839742/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017-tdb?refcode=em170831")
And finally, the Texas SPCA is rescuing animals impacted by Harvey, as well as providing supplies for families with pets who were evacuated from their homes. [**You can contribute to them here.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b2/9e00690/4f38106c/24036a2b/4144839742/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017-spca?refcode=em170831")
Thank you for all you do.
Andrew

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b2/9e00690/4f38106c/24036a2a/4144839742/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b2/9e00690/4f38106c/24036a2d/4144839742/VEsA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32b2/9e00690/4f38106c/24036a2c/4144839742/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")
